name: [BUG-009] Login endpoint has no rate limiting
description:
Expected: After N failed login attempts, endpoint returns 429 Too Many Requests.
        Actual:   Unlimited login attempts allowed — brute force not prevented.
descriptionHtml:
Expected: After N failed login attempts, endpoint returns 429 Too Many Requests.
    Actual:   Unlimited login attempts allowed — brute force not prevented.
statusMessage:
XFAIL BUG-009: No rate limiting on login endpoint

AssertionError: Expected 429 after repeated failed logins but rate limiting is not implemented
assert 401 == 429
 +  where 401 = <WrapperTestResponse streamed [401 UNAUTHORIZED]>.status_code

labels.name: tag
labels.value: @pytest.mark.xfail(strict=True, reason='BUG-009: No rate limiting on login endpoint')

tags: @pytest.mark.xfail(strict=True, reason='BUG-009: No rate limiting on login endpoint')
